'''Thaldo''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Thaldo system/Legends|Thaldo system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The Rebel cell on Thaldo was one of many infiltrated by [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] [[Spy/Legends|spies]] some time following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Forgotten">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}}</ref>

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
An [[Water/Legends|icy]] world with a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] outpost during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was the site of the [[Battle of Thaldo]]. During the Empire's first wave of assault, the planet's [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] was damaged, but repaired by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] so the Rebels could evacuate.<ref name="YodaStories">''[[Star Wars: Yoda Stories]]''</ref>
{{Noncanonend}}

{{Planet-stub}}
